data.name: My Girlfriend Is an Egg
data.detailed_description:
For the past 10 years, You've been a scientist whose sole goal in life has been to clone food in order to solve world hunger, but you've failed time and time again, and now you have no more funding. With 1 more day left in the lab, you go all out in a desperate attempt to complete your research. But when you wake up, you find that your cloning machine hasn't cloned the egg you put in it, but has instead mutated it into a giant, 240cm tall, humanoid. Terrified of the consequences of your research, you smuggle her home, and It doesn't take long for her libido to overwhelm her.

  • ~1.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 21 Unique character images

  • 25 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 捷克文, 荷蘭文, 希臘文, 印尼語, 韓文, 波蘭文, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 越南文, 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 丹麥文, 芬蘭文, 匈牙利文, 日文, 挪威文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 繁體中文, 烏克蘭文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
